Event: The Gone Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 01/04/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: RI135


Other locations the gear can be found
Donkey
Red Dragon
Nameless Shadow Ring

Once in a while when an enemy is resurrected, 3 magic projectiles fly out of that enemy and hit the nearest enemies. Each projectile deals 80000 pure damage and prevents the use of the weapon, armor, and artifact abilities for 3 sec. If a unit hit by a magic projectile dies within 3 sec, they can't be resurrected for 3 sec. Additionally, the ring wearer restores health equal to 80% of the damage dealt by magic projectiles.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
